<!--
Write in English. Keep the task SMALL and SCOPED — one issue should map to one PR.
The Implementer will ask for clarification (instead of guessing) if this is ambiguous
or too large, so be specific. Add the `auto` label when you want it implemented.
-->

## Goal
<!-- One or two sentences: what should be true after this is done? -->

## Scope
- Area: <!-- e.g. backend `app/domains/tasks`, frontend `features/lists`, both -->
- In scope: <!-- what to change -->
- Out of scope: <!-- what NOT to touch -->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- Concrete, checkable. The PR (and its tests) should satisfy these. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Notes / context
<!-- Links, constraints, API shapes, examples. Optional. -->
